mdSummary:
# Steps

Numbered step indicator for wizards and progress flows.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Lists & Trees
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/steps

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Steps | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Steps | CurrentStep | `int` | `` |  |
| Steps | CurrentStepChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| Steps | Clickable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Steps | Orientation | `StepsOrientation` | `StepsOrientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Steps | Animated | `bool` | `` | When true, enables opt-in motion: the current step's indicator pulses, connector lines draw in on advance, and retract on reverse. Default is false (no animation, original behaviour). |
| Steps | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Steps | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | Context | `Steps.StepsContext?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | Status | `StepsItemStatus` | `StepsItemStatus.Default` |  |
| StepsItem | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| StepsItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepsItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Steps) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (StepsItem) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

## Events
- `CurrentStepChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`)

## Sub-components
- `StepsItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Steps.StepsContext?`)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Steps />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Steps/Steps.razor`
- `UI/Steps/StepsItem.razor`
